calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-27-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

James P. Green, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Elizabeth A. Green, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Thomas Vella, individually and under the firm and style name of Centanni, Inc., or Danielle Vella, individually and under the firm and style name of Centanni, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant Thomas Vella, individually and under the firm and style name of Centanni, Inc. on March 19, 2009.
Default was entered against defendant Danielle Vella, individually and under the firm and style name of Centanni, Inc. on May 27, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, August 27, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Elizabeth A. Green, and against the Defaulted Defendants Thomas Vella, individually and under the firm and style name of Centanni, Inc., and Danielle Vella, individually and under the firm and style name of Centanni, Inc., as follows:

Compensatory Damages - $62,500.00.
Costs - 275.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $62,775.00.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than September 1, 2009.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2009 Continued To Oct-05-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-29-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-29-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
